title: Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates:
Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates!
